spec_match.rationale: A highly comprehensive, technically deep migration manual explaining how origin boundaries partition IndexedDB, service workers, cookies, and passkeys.

interactive.rationale: Although mostly educational, it displays detailed structural layout lists, badges, and code snippets beautifully.

edge_cases.rationale: Exceptional: details 12 distinct storage types (IndexedDB, OPFS, cookies, etc.) and lays out concrete IndexedDB code patterns.

references.rationale: Properly points to the tracking ChromeStatus entry under see also.

design_system.rationale: Beautiful design employing neat status badges, grid cards, and elegant ivory summaries.
